로마서 7:1.content: Or don’t you know, brothers (for I speak to men who know the law), that the law has dominion over a man for as long as he lives?

로마서 7:2.content: For the woman that has a husband is bound by law to the husband while he lives, but if the husband dies, she is discharged from the law of the husband.

로마서 7:3.content: So then if, while the husband lives, she is joined to another man, she would be called an adulteress. But if the husband dies, she is free from the law, so that she is no adulteress, though she is joined to another man.

로마서 7:4.content: Therefore, my brothers, you also were made dead to the law through the body of Christ, that you would be joined to another, to him who was raised from the dead, that we might produce fruit to God.

로마서 7:5.content: For when we were in the flesh, the sinful passions which were through the law worked in our members to bring out fruit to death.

로마서 7:6.content: But now we have been discharged from the law, having died to that in which we were held; so that we serve in newness of the spirit, and not in oldness of the letter.

로마서 7:7.content: What shall we say then? Is the law sin? May it never be! However, I wouldn’t have known sin, except through the law. For I wouldn’t have known coveting, unless the law had said, “You shall not covet.”

로마서 7:8.content: But sin, finding occasion through the commandment, produced in me all kinds of coveting. For apart from the law, sin is dead.

로마서 7:9.content: I was alive apart from the law once, but when the commandment came, sin revived, and I died.

로마서 7:10.content: The commandment which was for life, this I found to be for death;

로마서 7:11.content: for sin, finding occasion through the commandment, deceived me, and through it killed me.

로마서 7:12.content: Therefore the law indeed is holy, and the commandment holy, and righteous, and good.

로마서 7:13.content: Did then that which is good become death to me? May it never be! But sin, that it might be shown to be sin, was producing death in me through that which is good; that through the commandment sin might become exceedingly sinful.

로마서 7:14.content: For we know that the law is spiritual, but I am fleshly, sold under sin.

로마서 7:15.content: For I don’t know what I am doing. For I don’t practice what I desire to do; but what I hate, that I do.

로마서 7:16.content: But if what I don’t desire, that I do, I consent to the law that it is good.

로마서 7:17.content: So now it is no more I that do it, but sin which dwells in me.

로마서 7:18.content: For I know that in me, that is, in my flesh, dwells no good thing. For desire is present with me, but I don’t find it doing that which is good.

로마서 7:19.content: For the good which I desire, I don’t do; but the evil which I don’t desire, that I practice.

로마서 7:20.content: But if what I don’t desire, that I do, it is no more I that do it, but sin which dwells in me.

로마서 7:21.content: I find then the law that, to me, while I desire to do good, evil is present.

로마서 7:22.content: For I delight in God’s law after the inward man,

로마서 7:23.content: but I see a different law in my members, warring against the law of my mind, and bringing me into captivity under the law of sin which is in my members.

로마서 7:24.content: What a wretched man I am! Who will deliver me out of the body of this death?

로마서 7:25.content: I thank God through Jesus Christ, our Lord! So then with the mind, I myself serve God’s law, but with the flesh, sin’s law.
